mlp_status.reason: skipped_by_design_runtime_scope; package requires HGB/ExtraTrees/LightGBM/XGBoost, MLP optional

price_forecast_ablation.learning_threshold: keep if holdout or weekly improves by >=2%, or >=3% in at least two important regimes without broad worsening

se3_vs_se1_price_effect_comparison.note: Positive improvement percent means with-price MAE is lower than no-price MAE.
